name: Crossref DOI Resolver
tagline: Lets the BFrost assistant resolve DOIs and publication metadata through Crossref.
description:
An assistant-tool worker that looks up publication metadata from the public Crossref API. It can resolve a DOI or search by title and returns structured title, author, venue, year, DOI, publisher, type, and source URL data.

It is intentionally small: no OAuth, no credentials, and an optional contact email setting for Crossref API etiquette.
author: @ccascio

versions.changelog: Initial source-backed release with Crossref assistant tool, optional contact-email setting, lookup history dashboard, and low-code README.
